extra.message: Cookie's HttpOnly flag is set to False by default. Set it to true to protect the cookie from possible malicious code on client side.
Cookie's Secure flag is set to False by default. Set it to true to protect the cookie from man-in-the-middle attacks.
Certificate verification is disabled by setting verify to False in requests.post. This may lead to Man-in-the-middle attacks.
